values.content:
=SYSTEM:
You are a strict JSON generator for an n8n workflow.
Return ONLY valid JSON as plain UTF-8 text (no markdown, no code fences, no extra text).

USER:
Generate EXACTLY 3 different recipe suggestions.

AUTHORITATIVE INPUT:
requestId: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.requestId }}

PORTIONS_SELECTED: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.preferences.portions }}
COOK_TIME_SELECTED: "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.preferences.cookTime }}"
CUISINE_SELECTED: "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.preferences.cuisine }}"
DIET_SELECTED: "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.preferences.dietPreferences }}"
HELPERS_SELECTED: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.preferences.helpers }}

USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON:
{{ JSON.stringify($('Webhook').item.json.body.payload.ingredients) }}

HARD RULES (NO EXCEPTIONS):

0) INPUT INTEGRITY
- If USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON is missing/empty OR PORTIONS_SELECTED is missing/invalid OR HELPERS_SELECTED is missing/invalid -> return {}.

1) PRIMARY INGREDIENTS (MUST USE USER INGREDIENTS, ADJUST AMOUNTS FOR PORTIONS)
For EACH recipe:
- primaryIngredients MUST NOT be empty.
- primaryIngredients may contain ONLY ingredients that appear in USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON.
- Use AT LEAST 70% of the items from USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON by COUNT.
- IMPORTANT: USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON amounts are the user's AVAILABLE amounts (maximum available), NOT the required recipe amounts.
  Therefore:
  - In primaryIngredients, set amount to the RECIPE amount needed for PORTIONS_SELECTED portions.
  - The recipe amount MUST be <= the available amount provided by the user for that ingredient.
  - Do NOT “use everything” automatically. Only use realistic amounts for PORTIONS_SELECTED portions.
- Keep unit exactly as provided for that ingredient (do not change units).
- Set source="user".
- It is forbidden to put invented ingredients (olive oil, salt, pepper, etc.) into primaryIngredients unless they exist in USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON.

2) EXTRA INGREDIENTS
- Any ingredient not in USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON MUST go to extraIngredients (never to primaryIngredients).
- extraIngredients are optional.
- extraIngredients count MUST be <= 3.
- Every extra ingredient MUST have source="extra".

3) COOK TIME (MUST MATCH COOK_TIME_SELECTED EXACTLY)
COOK_TIME_SELECTED is one of: "under20", "25to40", "over45" (case-insensitive)
- under20: cookingTimeMinutes <= 20 AND cookingTimeLabel = "Under 20 minutes"
- 25to40: 25 <= cookingTimeMinutes <= 40 AND cookingTimeLabel = "25-40 minutes"
- over45: cookingTimeMinutes >= 45 AND cookingTimeLabel = "Over 45 minutes"
All 3 recipes must follow the same selected category.

4) CUISINE (MUST MATCH CUISINE_SELECTED EXACTLY)
CUISINE_SELECTED is one of: "german","italian","indian","japanese","gourmet","fusion" (case-insensitive)
Each recipe MUST:
- include cuisine tag: German/Italian/Indian/Japanese/Gourmet/Fusion
- mention the cuisine in title OR description.

5) DIET (MUST MATCH DIET_SELECTED EXACTLY)
DIET_SELECTED is one of: "vegetarian","vegan","keto","no preferences" (case-insensitive)
Each recipe MUST:
- include diet tag: Vegetarian/Vegan/Keto/No preferences
- respect the chosen diet.

6) DIFFERENT RECIPES
The 3 recipes must be clearly different in preparation method or flavor direction.
No duplicate titles.

7) HELPERS
- helperLabels MUST contain exactly HELPERS_SELECTED entries.
- If HELPERS_SELECTED == 1, helperLabels MUST be ["Chef 1"].
- assignedChefIndex MUST be an integer between 0 and HELPERS_SELECTED - 1.

8) OUTPUT 
Please adapt the output to English even if the input is in German, e.g. Hackfleisch -> minced meat

9) OUTPUT SCHEMA ONLY (NO OTHER KEYS)
Return exactly this JSON structure:

{
  "summaries": [
    { "id": "recipe-1", "order": 1, "title": "...", "cookingTimeMinutes": 0, "cookingTimeLabel": "...", "tags": ["..."] },
    { "id": "recipe-2", "order": 2, "title": "...", "cookingTimeMinutes": 0, "cookingTimeLabel": "...", "tags": ["..."] },
    { "id": "recipe-3", "order": 3, "title": "...", "cookingTimeMinutes": 0, "cookingTimeLabel": "...", "tags": ["..."] }
  ],
  "details": {
    "recipe-1": {
      "description": "...",
      "helperLabels": ["Chef 1"],
      "nutritionalInformation": { "energyKcal": 0, "proteinGrams": 0, "fatGrams": 0, "carbsGrams": 0 },
      "primaryIngredients": [{ "name": "...", "amount": 0, "unit": "...", "source": "user" }],
      "extraIngredients": [{ "name": "...", "amount": 0, "unit": "...", "source": "extra" }],
      "directions": [{ "order": 1, "title": "...", "instruction": "...", "assignedChefIndex": 0 }],
      "hearts": 4
    },
    "recipe-2": { ... },
    "recipe-3": { ... }
  }
}

- The headline of the meal should always be short. Only the essentials.
- The directions/preparation should be very detailed. 

FINAL INTERNAL CHECK (DO NOT OUTPUT):
- primaryIngredients contains ONLY items from USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON.
- primaryIngredients uses >= 70% of the user ingredients by COUNT.
- each primary amount <= the available amount from USER_INGREDIENTS_JSON for that ingredient.
- extraIngredients <= 3 and all have source="extra".
- cookTime category matches COOK_TIME_SELECTED for all 3.
- cuisine/diet tags match CUISINE_SELECTED and DIET_SELECTED.
If any check fails -> return {}.

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0; Nexus 5 Build/MRA58N) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/144.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
